steps.title: Build the generalization
steps.content: The notes explain that urban flowering vegetation gives honeybees a varied diet, which strengthens their immune systems. They also show higher winter survival in urban areas than in rural areas, where monoculture crops are common.

steps.title: Require claim and support
steps.content: A compares vegetation, not honeybee success. B gives survival statistics but no causal explanation. C explains diet and immunity but does not state the broader thriving comparison clearly. The best sentence generalizes that bees are more likely to thrive in cities and supports it with the varied-diet mechanism. The answer is D.
